name: Tachikaze
desc: If you control only "Wezaemon the Tombguard": You can pay 800 LP, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy it. You can banish this card from your GY; Set 1 "Tachikaze" or "Raisho" directly from your Deck. It can be activated this turn. You can only use this effect of "Tachikaze" once per turn.
